theorems.name: Cauchy integral formula
theorems.reduces: convert contour integrals of holomorphic functions into point values or derivatives
prerequisites: holomorphicity on and inside the contour
verificationHints: check the contour encloses the evaluation point
check holomorphicity on the relevant domain
theorems.wolframHint: Use wolfram_residue or wolfram_differentiate to verify the equivalent derivative form.

theorems.name: Dirichlet test
theorems.reduces: prove convergence of oscillatory series or integrals by separating cancellation from monotone decay
verificationHints: verify the bounded partial sums condition
theorems.wolframHint: Use wolfram_sum for candidate partial sums and wolfram_limit for the decay factor.

theorems.name: Implicit function theorem
theorems.reduces: turn a nonlinear equation into a locally defined differentiable function under a nondegenerate derivative condition
verificationHints: check the equation holds at the base point
check the relevant Jacobian determinant is nonzero
preferredRecipe: differentiate the implicit relation if needed
theorems.wolframHint: Use wolfram_differentiate and wolfram_solve or wolfram_simplify to verify the Jacobian condition.
